description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden sideboard or cabinet with a dark brown, polished wood top and a painted, off-white or cream-colored body. The front features three panel doors, each with a round knob, and three drawers above, each with a small handle, providing ample storage space. The sides are plain with recessed panels, while the back is constructed from a less finished, natural wood, indicating it is meant to be placed against a wall. The overall design is classic and functional, suitable for urban environments such as cafes, community centers, or residential entryways. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy legs and has a robust, solid appearance. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the surface is flat and suitable for supporting additional objects.
description: A large, freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark brown top and cream-colored body, featuring three drawers and three panel doors. The design is classic and functional, with a flat, sturdy surface and no visible contents.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with handles and three panel doors with knobs, all in a cream-colored finish beneath a dark brown top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, cream-colored recessed panel and the thickness of the dark brown top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a natural wood finish with three large panels and no handles or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a plain, cream-colored recessed panel and the dark brown top.
